stemHtml: A captain who usually flies commercially is instead flying a sightseeing VFR flight, operating in the local area with passengers. This flight has differing documentation requirements from a normal commercial flight. What is a key difference?

options.a: Passenger manifests and flight plans are not required for VFR flights.
options.b: There is no difference in document requirements for any type of commercial flight.
options.c: NOTAMs and weather information are not required.
options.d: Several Documents can be left on the ground, including the technical log, NOTAMS and mass & balance documentation.
